description: Reconciliation settings for Phase 3 broker-vs-local state checks

orphaned_orders.description: Orders at broker with no matching local tracking

missing_tracking.description: Broker positions with no local position_tracking entry

stale_tracking.description: Local tracking for positions that no longer exist at broker

duplicate_orders.description: Multiple active orders for the same symbol

order_state_mismatch.description: Broker order status differs from expected local state

missing_stop_after_fill.description: Position exists but no trailing/stop order active

symbol_tradeable_while_paused.description: Orders active for symbols while system is paused/killed
